Pain & Gain (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $49,875,291Details
International Box Office $31,400,000
Worldwide Box Office $81,275,291
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,845,730
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,457,374
Total $17,303,104
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An action comedy based on the true story of a group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami who, in pursuit of the American Dream, get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,244,505 (40.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:61.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$26,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,277 opening theaters/3,303 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $73,371,275

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 26th, 2013 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: April 24th, 2013 (Wide) (Egypt)
April 25th, 2013 (Wide) (Lebanon)
April 25th, 2013 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
April 25th, 2013 (Wide) (Ukraine)
April 25th, 2013 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: August 27th, 2013 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for bloody violence, crude sexual content, nudity, language throughout and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2268, 4/17/2013)
Running Time: 129 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Plot point: Bodybuilders, Class Warfare, Kidnap, Life on the Outside, Private Investigator
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: De Line Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

An action comedy based on the true story of a group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami who, in pursuit of the American Dream, get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.
